title: Juttadinteria ausensis
taxonomy: Juttadinteria ausensis is classified within the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the carpetweed or ice plant family. It belongs to the genus Juttadinteria, which is a group of succulent plants native to southern Africa. The species J. ausensis is further classified as a member of the subfamily Ruschioideae, a large and diverse subgroup within the Aizoaceae family. The Aizoaceae family is a part of the larger order Caryophyllales, which includes other succulent plants and flowering plants with similar characteristics. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics of J. ausensis with other plants in its family.
